/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS/INTC/X: DEFENSEREQUEST TO REMOVE GPS IS DENIED/X: PEOPLE'S REQUEST TO REMAND DEFENDANT ISDENIED/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUSLY FILED STAY AWAY ORDER/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING & DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR//LDPX: 04-21-22(60)/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:03-21-22(60)/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA1: HYDE STREET & ELLIS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD4: 300 YARDS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/
